author: mrmundt
text:
## Summary

The existing action we use to build wheels for release has been archived. It has a recommendation for a better maintained action to use instead.

### Rationale

We don't want to rely on archived/not maintained actions.

### Description

* The original wheel builder: <https://github.com/RalfG/python-wheels-manylinux-build>
* The new wheel builder: <https://github.com/pypa/cibuildwheel>

### Additional information

There are more options for architectures in the new wheel builder. We may want to explore those options.
